subject: FILIPINO
title: Elemento ng Kuwento
objective: Tukuyin ang tauhan, tagpuan, pangyayari, suliranin, at posibleng kalutasan.
introduction: Ang mga kuwento ay maaaring may tauhan, tagpuan, mahahalagang pangyayari, at minsan ay suliranin at kalutasan. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Elemento ng Kuwento”.
A key word used in the lesson “Elemento ng Kuwento”.
A key word used in the lesson “Elemento ng Kuwento”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Ang mga kuwento ay maaaring may tauhan, tagpuan, mahahalagang pangyayari, at minsan ay suliranin at kalutasan.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Ang mga kuwento ay maaaring may tauhan, tagpuan, mahahalagang pangyayari, at minsan ay suliranin at kalutasan.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

feedback.correct: Correct: lugar at panahon ng kuwento
feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. taong sumulat and aral lamang do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Elemento ng Kuwento”?

options.text: Ang mga kuwento ay maaaring may tauhan, tagpuan, mahahalagang pangyayari, at minsan ay suliranin at kalutasan.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Ang mga kuwento ay maaaring may tauhan, tagpuan, mahahalagang pangyayari, at minsan ay suliranin at kalutasan.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang mga kuwento ay maaaring may tauhan, tagpuan, mahahalagang pangyayari, at minsan ay suliranin at kalutasan.
The correct response is “tauhan—gumaganap” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang mga kuwento ay maaaring may tauhan, tagpuan, mahahalagang pangyayari, at minsan ay suliranin at kalutasan.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?
items.explanation: The correct response is “tagpuan—pangalan ng may-akda” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang mga kuwento ay maaaring may tauhan, tagpuan, mahahalagang pangyayari, at minsan ay suliranin at kalutasan.

The correct response is “lugar at panahon ng kuwento” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang mga kuwento ay maaaring may tauhan, tagpuan, mahahalagang pangyayari, at minsan ay suliranin at kalutasan.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?
items.explanation: The correct response is “pangyayari—naganap” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang mga kuwento ay maaaring may tauhan, tagpuan, mahahalagang pangyayari, at minsan ay suliranin at kalutasan.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Elemento ng Kuwento; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Elemento ng Kuwento.
